protein_name: EGF stimulates the growth of various epidermal and epithelial tissues in vivo and in vitro and of some fibroblasts in cell culture. Magnesiotropic hormone that stimulates magnesium reabsorption in the renal distal convoluted tubule via engagement of EGFR and activation of the magnesium channel TRPM6. Can induce neurite outgrowth in motoneurons of the pond snail Lymnaea stagnalis in vitro. Expressed in kidney, salivary gland, cerebrum and prostate. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
